overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian industrial market area beneath an overpass. The scene transitions from narrow container-lined corridors to bustling neon-lit market stalls with various vendors and NPCs. Atmospheric haze and warm artificial lighting create a cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into area with view of sky and distant city
exiting enclosed corridor into more open industrial yard

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow container-lined corridor toward an opening with city view

entered.detail: stacked dark metal shipping containers lining the right side of the corridor
massive concrete and metal overpass structure overhead with exposed beams
wall with white graffiti text reading RANCID BAKERY
industrial fluorescent tube lights mounted on the left wall
debris and cardboard scattered across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor flanked by shipping containers and illuminated by harsh fluorescent lights. The camera moves forward through trash-strewn concrete, passing graffiti on the walls, gradually approaching an opening that reveals a hazy view of a distant city skyline with a distinctive tall tower.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a semi-covered industrial yard with a view of the distant city skyline through atmospheric haze. The camera passes an NPC standing near containers while approaching a transition to a commercial area with visible neon lighting ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a commercial market zone marked by a prominent PHARMACEUTICALS stall with green neon lighting. After passing the vendor, the camera turns right into a narrow passage between shipping containers, moving deeper into the market area with overhead netting visible.

segments.scene_description: The camera navigates through winding market passages lined with digital billboards and food vendor signs. Passing under a bright light that creates a lens flare, the scene opens into a wider thoroughfare marked by a distinctive teal neon chevron archway and the glowing PieZ restaurant sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy covered market with multiple vendor stalls and overhead advertisements

segments.scene_description: The market becomes densely crowded as the camera moves through the main thoroughfare. Overhead billboards advertise products while pedestrians with distinctive cyberpunk fashion, including a person with a red mohawk, navigate the narrow walkway between clothing stalls and food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: quieter market plaza with seating area and graffiti walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a quieter plaza area with less crowd density. The camera passes people sitting at outdoor tables and a wall covered in graffiti art, moving toward an open exit framed by massive industrial support beams.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial market. It begins by moving through a narrow passage flanked by shipping containers and harsh fluorescent lights, passing graffiti and trash-strewn concrete toward a distant, hazy city skyline. As the camera emerges into a semi-covered industrial yard, the view of the towering city expands before the environment shifts toward a more commercial atmosphere. The scene then opens into a bustling market zone, passing a pharmaceutical stall illuminated by green neon lighting before turning right into a narrow passage beneath overhead netting.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense industrial market that transitions from narrow, neon-lit corridors into a spacious urban plaza. It begins by navigating winding passages lined with digital billboards and food signs, passing under a bright light that triggers a lens flare as the view opens into a wider thoroughfare marked by a teal neon chevron archway and a glowing PieZ restaurant sign. As the camera pushes forward, the environment becomes increasingly crowded with pedestrians in cyberpunk fashion, including a person with a red mohawk, who navigate the tight spaces between clothing stalls and overhead advertisements. The scene then shifts toward a quieter plaza area with lower crowd density, passing people seated at outdoor tables and walls adorned with graffiti art. Finally, the movement leads toward an open exit framed by massive industrial support beams.
